calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:03am and concluding at 10:14am.

Plaintiff Dairyland Produce, LLC appearing represented by Dominique Angelo, Esq., via zoo.
Defendants Berber Group, LLC and Tony Garnicki not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff HUY TRAN and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Dairyland Produce LLC, and against Defendants Berber Group, LLC and Tony Garnicki, as follows:

Damages: $37,823.52
Prejudgment Interest: $6,630.40
Attorney Fees: $2,375.00
Costs: $1,007.10
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $47,836.02

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
